queries.question: What is the difficulty level of the waterfall loop?
queries.sql: Select Reviews.difficulty_level From Reviews Where Reviews.Hikes = 'Waterfall loop'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?difficulty_level WHERE {
  ?reviews a :Reviews .
  ?reviews p:difficulty_level ?difficulty_level .
  ?reviews p:hikes ?hikes_f .
  FILTER(STR(?hikes_f) = "Waterfall loop")
}

queries.question: What hikes do we have and what are their ratings?
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?hikes ?customer_review WHERE {
  ?reviews a :Reviews .
  ?reviews p:hikes ?hikes .
  ?reviews p:customer_review ?customer_review .
}
